title: RoutineTrigger — webhook
description: HMAC-verified webhook trigger. Mounted at /hooks/<path> on the deck server.

path.description: Public path on the deck server. Lowercase, kebab-case under /hooks/.

secret_env.description: Env var name holding the HMAC secret. Argon2id-hashed copy lives in routine_webhook_secrets; rotation via POST /api/routines/:id/webhook-secret/rotate.
